items.title: AT&T is letting you 'build your own' wireless plan starting at just $15 a month
items.summary: AT&T's 'build your own' wireless plan starts at just $15 a month, but only comes with 1GB of data to start.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: The cost of the smart home is going up
items.summary: Selling the smart home has been hard. Even Amazon has lost money in the space, despite putting hundreds of millions of Echo devices in people's homes. Google has also reportedly...

items.title: Honasa Consumer Q4 profit surges to Rs 69.43 Cr; declares maiden final dividend
items.summary: The company's revenue from operations surged 23.15% to Rs 657.08 crore in the Q4, from Rs 533.56 crore a year ago.
